page.title: Relationship States and Unfinished Words
page.description: Use five classification dimensions to see your relationship world, and unfinished weight to hold what has not been said yet.

overview.classificationDescription: These dimensions group and observe the relationship world; unfinished weight stays in details and unsent words.
overview.typeDescription: What is the core bond here?
overview.depthDescription: How open can I be in this relationship?
overview.stageDescription: Where is this relationship moving now?
overview.impactDescription: Is it nourishing, draining, neutral, or mixed?
overview.unfinishedDescription: Unfinished weight evaluates a single relationship and does not belong in the main filters.
overview.nourishingDetail: Relationships that restore or strengthen you
overview.drainingDetail: Relationships that need boundaries or fresh judgment
overview.repairingDetail: Relationships most worth gently checking now
overview.heavyDetail: Unfinished words to write down or process first

graph.helper: Circles connect people, people connect unsent words, and patterns add dashed links when their cues match tags or emotional signals.
graph.centeredHelper: Centered view prioritizes explicit person-to-person connections, then layers circle and pattern edges as supporting context.
graph.editHint: Switch to Control Mode to edit relationship, unsent-word, and pattern nodes directly from here.
graph.detailDescription: Select different node types to see their place, context, and nearby links in the relationship network.
graph.emptySelection: Select a node to see its details here.
graph.noPatternMatches: This pattern does not match any relationship nodes yet.

metrics.circlesDetail: How many relationship circles are in the current map
metrics.relationshipsDetail: Relationship people currently shown as graph nodes
metrics.notesDetail: Unsent-word nodes that are linked to relationship records
metrics.linksDetail: Connections between circles, people, notes, and patterns

empty.history: No depth or stage changes yet.
empty.graph: No relationship links to show yet.
empty.selectRelationship: Select a relationship from the left.
empty.selectNote: Select a note from the left.
empty.selectPattern: Select a pattern from the left.

edit.relationshipDescription: The five dimensions classify the relationship world; unfinished weight follows single relationships and unsent words.
edit.noteDescription: Write to an existing relationship, an independent target, or your future self.
edit.patternDescription: Review repeated roles and paths across relationships.
edit.name: Name
edit.connectionsDescription: Add real links between this person and others. When the other person opens edit mode, the roles will automatically flip into their perspective.
edit.noConnections: No person links yet. Add one like “student / teacher” or “friend / friend”.
edit.noEvents: No interaction events yet. Use Add above.
edit.noHistory: No change history yet. Use Add above.
edit.connectionRolesHint: Each row is a custom reciprocal relationship, for example current person as “student” and the other person as “teacher”; from the other side, the roles are shown reversed.
edit.connectionCardEmpty: No role pair yet. Open the card to fill in the details.
edit.connectionRoleNote: Add detail for this relationship row
edit.title: Title

toast.deleteRelationshipPending: {{name}} is queued for deletion. Undo is available for 5 seconds.
toast.deleteNotePending: Queued for deletion. Undo is available for 5 seconds.
toast.deletePatternPending: Queued for deletion. Undo is available for 5 seconds.
